response.justification: Aisha has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tooling (test runners, CI/CD, fluent-asserts), and leadership through open-source projects and workshops, but lacks clear evidence of formal people management, team leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this Engineering Productivity Manager role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership via open-source projects and workshops
Broad technical stack across languages, systems, and infrastructure (DLang, Node, Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: No explicit evidence of 2+ years in people management or team leadership
Limited visibility of mobile platform experience despite role focus on mobile ecosystem
Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) and lacks clear progression to managerial responsibilities
